name: James Metkus
title: Attending Physician, Sleep Medicine
bio: Dr. Metkus earned his medical degree at the Sidney Kimmel Medical College in Philadelphia, PA. He went on to complete his Otolaryngology-head and neck surgery residency at Stony Brook University Hospital followed by his fellowship training in sleep medicine at the University of Colorado. In his free time he enjoys hiking, skiing and spending time with his wife and son.
